foundationModules.purpose: Test utilities and ActiveJ eventloop test base

privacy.rationale: Privacy compliance requires encryption and audit logging for customer data

consent.rationale: Consent compliance requires durable consent record storage

audit.rationale: Audit compliance requires durable audit trail storage

recommendations.reason: Provides standardized PostgreSQL persistence and Flyway migrations
Production-grade HTTP server and client with ActiveJ integration
Required for production monitoring and compliance
Required for customer data protection (encryption, hashing, security)
Provides ActiveJ eventloop test base and test utilities
Transitive usage via kernel - evaluate if direct usage is needed for approval workflows
Not currently used - consider for AI-powered marketing recommendations in future
